{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Emissaries
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Emissaries]] grow by ingesting pieces of the [[Phoenix]] that it sheds.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c9">''Dreadgod'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Emissaries]] are those who borrow power from the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c14">''Dreadgod'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
